description: Vertical graphic built on a photograph with a slogan overlay. The photo shows an outdoor scene: in the foreground a man (gray hair and beard, dark shirt) stands with his back to the camera, hands cuffed behind his back, while at right a law-enforcement officer seen from behind wears a green tactical or molle vest with a tan or khaki patch reading 'POLICE / ICE' and tan cargo pants with a holstered sidearm; a chain-link fence and green trees form the background. Overlaid on the lower-left is a solid-blue box with white serif text 'Making America Safe Again'.
notable_text: POLICE / ICE (officer's vest). Making America Safe Again.
